prestazioni: VQ35DE (3.5L V6, 265hp stock) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R, 56 trim) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 4-2-1 exhaust manifold, paired with a GReddy E-Manage Ultimate piggyback ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to target 380whp on 93 octane

KW Variant 3 coilovers (rebound-adjustable, 80mm-120mm drop) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) to compensate for the CrossCabriolet's 200lb heavier chassis, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings for reduced body roll

Nissan 370Z NISMO brake upgrade (4-piston front calipers, 14-inch rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid, paired with custom stainless steel braided lines and a Wilwood proportioning valve for balanced front/rear bias
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 CrossCabriolet-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber accents on the A-pillars and roll hoops

Seibon carbon fiber hardtop replacement (20% lighter than OEM) with a custom rear spoiler (modeled after the Nissan Juke-R) and LED taillight conversion using Diode Dynamics SS360-X pods integrated into the OEM housing

Custom interior retrim with Recaro Pole Position seats (heated, Alcantara/leather) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), paired with a full carbon fiber dash overlay (including center console) and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded, 4-point) painted Nissan Racing Orange (KH3S)
